raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Isebele winna
Seewa us to: Tu / irr fchi ta-
wa Waldischana pahr Israëlu?
zellees / ehd Maisi / un lai tawa
Sir̄ds preezajabs / es gribbu tew
Nabbata ta Jesreëlitera Wihna-
Dahrsu eedeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta rakstija Grahmatas
Akaba Wahrdâ / un aissehgela-
ja tahs ar winna Gredsenu / un
fuhtija tahs Grahmatas pee teem
Wezzajeem / un pee teem Zeeni-
geem / kas winna Pilstahta bija /
un pee Nabbata dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta rakstija Grahmatas
fchohs Wahrdns: Jsauzeeft wee-
nu Gaweni / un fehdinajeet Nah-
batu angstaka Lauschu Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un atweddeet kahdus di-
wt netiklus Wihns / kas prett
winna Leezibu dohd / un fakka:
Tu effi Deewu unn to Rehnian
faimojs / un isweddeet winnu / un
nomehtajet winnu ar Akut-
neem / ka tas nomirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Pilsfakta Wih-
ri tee Wezzajee un Zeenigee / kas
winna Pilsfakta dsihwofa / dar-
rija / ka Isebele pee teem bij fuht-
tijt / tttin ta eeksch Grahmatahn
rakstihts bija / ko winna us teem
bij fuhttijust.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee issanze Gaweni /
un fehdinaja Nabbatu angstaka
Lauschu Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atnahze divi netikli
Wihri / un peestahjehs winna
Preefscha / un derwe prett Nah-
batu Leezibu Lauschu Preefscha /
un fazzija: Nabbats irr Deewu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un to Rehnianu faimojs / un tee
iswedde winnu no Pilstahta ah-
ra / un nomehtaja to ar Akuni-
neem / ka tas nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz fuhtija tee pee Ise-
beles / un likke fazziht: Nabbats
irr ar Akunneem nomehtahts / 
un irr nomieris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Isebele dsirdeja /
ta Nabbats bij ar Akunneem no-
mehtahts / un nomirris / tad faz-
zija Isebele us Akabu : Zellees /
ceimanto Nabbata ta Jesreëlitera
Wihna-Dahrsu / ko winsch tew
leedsees par Naudu doht / jo Nah-
bats ne irr wairs dsihws / bet no-
mirris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Akabs dsirdeja /
ta Nabbats bija nomirris / tad
zehlehs Akabs / ta tas no-eetu us
Nabbata ta Jesreëlitera Wihna-
Dahrsu / winnu eenemt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta KUNGA Wahrd̄s
notifke us Elijasu to Tisbiteri /
fazzidams:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zellees / no-eij Akabam
tam Israëla Rehnianam pretti /
kas eeksch Samarias irr / rangi /
winch irr Nabbata Wihna-
Dahrsa / kurp tas irr nogahjes
winnu eenemt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs winnam ta
runnaht / un fazziht : Ta fakka
tas KUNGS: Effi tu nokmvts /
Ta takka tas KUNGS: Tai
Weeta / kur tee Sunni Nabbata
Affini latfijschi / latfihs tee Sun-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
